on_create_po.reason: PO is just an order document, no inventory/accounting impact

on_submit_po.reason: Submit only changes status, waiting for goods receipt

on_partial_receive.stock_quantity: Only received quantity, not ordered quantity
on_partial_receive.reason: Stock increases only for actually received items

on_final_receive.reason: Full receipt triggers AP creation for payment tracking

stock_rule: Stock ONLY changes via official receiving flow, NOT on PO creation/submission
accounting_rule: AP/Journal ONLY created on full receipt, NOT on PO creation/submission
